facebook.caption:
POV: you land in Phu Quoc, need dong, and walk past three bad-rate booths before someone points you here.

EXMoney at 10 Đường Nguyễn Trãi sits right by Chợ đêm Phú Quốc. 4.9 stars. 39 reviews. That rating for a currency exchange is rare.

Get your dong sorted before you hit the market stalls. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the rate board before you exchange anywhere else. EXMoney next to Chợ đêm Phú Quốc. 4.9 stars. Your wallet notices the difference.

instagram.caption:
Walked past 3 exchange booths. Found this one. 4.9★ at EXMoney, Chợ đêm Phú Quốc. Don't skip it.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
instagram.video_caption: Rate board. Night market lights. Your first smart move in Phu Quoc starts at EXMoney on Đường Nguyễn Trãi.

tiktok.caption: Don't exchange money at the airport. Find EXMoney by Chợ đêm Phú Quốc first. 4.9★ says it all. #PhuQuoc #PhuQuocTips #VietnamTravel
